title: helichrysum camusianum
intro: Helichrysum camusianum, also known as the alpine curry plant or yellow mountain everlasting, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the high-altitude regions of Europe, particularly in the Alps, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's flowers and leaves have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and boosting the immune system. Helichrysum camusianum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
